input.hiring_signal_brief: Funding history shows Series D; last public funding appears older than 180 days.; Open engineering roles increased over the last 60 days; New VP Engineering joined within the last 90 days; Uses Python, AWS, and modern data tooling

ai_maturity_profile.rationale: At least one AI-adjacent role is open. Public GitHub activity suggests AI-related work. Executive commentary references AI strategically. Modern data/ML tooling signals are present. Strategic communications mention AI direction. Tech-stack signal reinforces AI/data readiness.

input.competitor_gap_brief: Compared with peers such as Brex, Mercury, Rippling, Ramp appears to be missing public signals for Dedicated ML platform capability. The company appears ready for a capability-gap conversation.

bench_match_summary.bench_notes: Requested capabilities inferred: Python, Data Engineering, Machine Learning, AWS. Matched capabilities: Python, Data Engineering, Machine Learning, AWS. Current bench includes strong Python, data, ML, and infra coverage for small to mid-sized delivery pods.

input.evaluation_instruction: Score the candidate outreach against Tenacious rules: grounded signal use, confidence-aware phrasing, banned phrases, no external bench language, capacity truthfulness, pricing scope, single ask, word limit, and non-condescending framing.

candidate_output:
Hi [Recipient's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I noticed that Ramp has recently welcomed a new VP of Engineering and has been expanding its engineering roles. Given your focus on modern data tooling and AI, I believe there may be an opportunity for us to discuss how Tenacious Consulting can support your initiatives in this area.

We specialize in helping organizations like yours enhance their AI capabilities and optimize their data strategies. If you're open to it, I would love to schedule a brief call to explore how we can assist Ramp during this transition.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
Tenacious Consulting  
[Your Contact Information]
